entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH THIS EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING WEST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

SUNNY, BREEZY WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH, INCREASING TO 15 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
BREEZY WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 25 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH IN THE EVENING
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
LOWS AROUND 70
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT
